name: Barbell Bench Press
description: Flat barbell bench press targeting the chest, shoulders, and triceps. Lie on a flat bench, grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder width, lower to mid-chest, and press upward.

name: Barbell Deadlift
description: Conventional barbell deadlift from the floor. Hinge at the hips, grip the bar just outside the knees, brace the core, and drive through the floor to stand upright.

name: Barbell Squat
description: High-bar back squat. Position the barbell on the upper traps, descend by breaking at the hips and knees simultaneously, squat to parallel or below, and drive upward.

name: Overhead Press
description: Standing barbell overhead press. Unrack the bar at shoulder height, brace the core, and press the bar overhead to full lockout. Control the descent back to the shoulders.

name: Barbell Row
description: Bent-over barbell row. Hinge forward at the hips with a slight knee bend, grip the bar shoulder-width, and row the bar into the lower chest while keeping the torso stable.
